use_cases: Triggering actions in contact management interfaces
Opening modal dialogs for contact details
Performing CRUD operations on contact entries
ai_summary: A reusable button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for flexible variant and size styling. Supports six visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) with four size options (default, small, large, icon). Part of a contact card component system, designed for integration in contact management interfaces and form-based workflows.
